categories.name: What coal is burned to make

fun_fact: Coal is one of the dirtiest ways to make electricity. In July 2025 India exempted 78% of its coal plants from installing SO₂ scrubbers (FGD). SO₂ is associated with respiratory diseases, cardiovascular illnesses, stroke and premature deaths. A recent study found that the largest SO₂ emitters around Delhi-NCR are the very plants that have been given the relaxation, raising concerns about worsening air quality. Read more
